message:
feat(s3): add create_bucket/delete_bucket operations and enrich audit trails

Implement bucket lifecycle operations:

- s3.create_bucket: dangerous-tier with execution approval gating,
  bucket_url() and put_empty_request() client helpers
- s3.delete_bucket: dangerous-tier with approval context, delete_request()
- Enrich s3.delete_object response with structured audit field
- Enrich s3.generate_presigned_url with audit metadata

Add CreateBucketResponse/DeleteBucketResponse types. Comprehensive
integration tests for bucket CRUD and enriched audit trail verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
